rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions Re - Sale Of Real Property [Probate Code 9610]
rulings.Rulings: continued to january 18, 2017 to be reviewed by Ms. Trowbridge, who has been reviewing this matter since 2013. rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/11/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
